executives.name: Aida Alvarez
executives.background: Aida Alvarez has served as a member of our board of directors since August 2019. Ms. Alvarez was the Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration and a member of President Clinton’s Cabinet from 1997 to 2001.

executives.name: Brett Biggs
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Walmart Inc. Director since 2022.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Christopher Williams
executives.background: Chairman of Siebert Williams Shank & Co., LLC.

executives.name: Jacqui Canney
executives.background: Jacqui Canney has served as our Chief People Officer since July 2021. Prior to joining ServiceNow, she was the Chief People Officer at WPP plc.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief People Officer

executives.name: Michele Burns
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Mercer LLC. Former CFO of Delta Air Lines, Inc. and Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.

executives.name: Thomas Horton
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of American Airlines.

executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Walmart Inc.
